escalation.rationale: Active US-Iran war in third week with strikes on US Embassy Baghdad, Israeli ground operations in Lebanon, and Iran closing Strait of Hormuz affecting global shipping.

ticker_items: Iran-US war enters third week, US Embassy Baghdad hit by drone
Israeli medics killed in southern Lebanon attack, 12 dead
Russian strike on Kyiv region kills 4, wounds 15
North Korea fires 10 ballistic missiles toward eastern sea
Strait of Hormuz blockade causes 90% drop in shipping traffic

eastern_europe.description: Russian air strike on residential buildings and infrastructure killed four civilians.
North Korea fired approximately 10 ballistic missiles toward eastern sea.
Combined missile and drone attack hit four districts, damaging residential buildings and critical infrastructure.

middle_east.description: US forces struck military targets on Iran's main oil export hub.
Israeli strike on medical clinic killed 12 healthcare workers.
Attack on US embassy in Baghdad following strikes on Iran-backed militia.
FPV drone attack on US Victory Base in Baghdad.
Iranian missile attack caused shrapnel damage to vehicles in Tel Aviv district.
Drone strike hit US Embassy compound helipad causing significant alarm.
Israeli attack killed 12 medics including doctors, paramedics and nurses on duty.
Debris from intercepted Iranian drone caused damage to major Emirati energy facility.

today.incident: Israeli strike on Lebanese medical clinic

claimed_totals.figure: 1,444 dead in Iran, 15 in Israel, 13 US soldiers, 19 in Gulf states
1,444 dead in Iran, 15 in Israel, 13 US soldiers, 19 in Gulf states

middle_east.text: The United States on Friday attacked military targets on Iran's main oil hub of Kharg Island, threatening to strike oil infrastructure on the island if Iran continues to block shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: Iran threatens to reduce US-linked oil facilities to 'pile of ashes' after US bombs Kharg Island.
middle_east.speaker: Iranian officials
middle_east.title: Government representatives

middle_east.text: Hamas called on Iran to refrain from targeting neighboring countries, while affirming Tehran's right to defend itself
middle_east.speaker: Hamas
middle_east.title: Palestinian organization

middle_east.text: Of course. Yes - Indian ships will be permitted passage through the Strait of Hormuz
middle_east.speaker: Iran's representative
middle_east.title: Iranian official in India

observers.description: Commercial vessels are reportedly identifying as Chinese-owned to avoid Iranian attacks in the Strait of Hormuz. China appears to be maintaining neutrality while benefiting from reduced shipping risks for its flagged vessels.

Canada is holding firm on Russian shadow fleet sanctions despite Trump administration's decision to ease restrictions. Prime Minister-designate Carney stated Canada's independent position on maintaining pressure on Russian oil exports.
Fired approximately 10 ballistic missiles toward eastern sea in show of force as South Korea conducts joint military exercises with United States.

financial.notes: Oil trading over $100 after US admitted inability to control Strait of Hormuz, with 90% drop in maritime traffic through critical chokepoint.

update_log.text: Iran strikes US Embassy Baghdad compound with drone as Middle East war enters third week
Israel kills 12 medics in southern Lebanon attack according to Al Jazeera
Russian combined missile and drone strike on Kyiv region kills 4 civilians, wounds 15
North Korea fires about 10 ballistic missiles toward eastern sea in show of force
Al Jazeera casualty tracker updated with preliminary war death tolls.
Iranian missiles cause shrapnel damage to vehicles in Tel Aviv district.
Kataib Hezbollah releases drone footage of attack on US Victory Base Baghdad.
Funeral held for influential Iranian defense chief Ali Shamkhani.
US announces deployment of 2,500 Marines and amphibious assault ship to Middle East.
Trump announces US forces struck military targets on Iran's Kharg Island oil hub.
Israeli strike kills 12 medical staff at clinic in southern Lebanon.
North Korea fires approximately 10 ballistic missiles during US-South Korea exercises.
